items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, US Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell. US Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, Chilean chemical and mining (SQM.US) down 3%, Sigma Lithium (SGML.US) down over 2%, Lithium Argentina (LAR.US) down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Stock Could Be 24.6% Undervalued After Recent Share Price Weakness
items.snippet: Albemarle fair value estimate 12.74, well above last close of 60.35. Key risk: lithium prices staying weak for longer or industry oversupply keeps pressure on margins and cash generation. Current P/S ratio of 3.4x looks demanding vs US Chemicals industry at 1.1x.

items.headline: Albemarle raised to buy at Citi with underappreciated growth opportunities ahead
items.snippet: Citi analyst Pat Cunningham says he is skeptical that the market will flip to a meaningful glut given current demand tailwinds. ALB seen as one of the primary beneficiaries of structural lithium demand tailwinds given its high-quality assets, conversion network, and potential to

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand - Buy - Citi
items.snippet: Citi has raised its investment opinion on Albemarle from High Risk to Buy, target price 25. ESS battery production forecast 950 GWh in 2026 (+35% YoY), 1300 GWh by 2027 (+37%). Market underestimating Albemarle growth potential despite recent weakness in spot lithium prices.

items.headline: This Divvie is the Ultimate Pick and Shovel Play on Elon Inc.
items.snippet: ALB controls roughly 15-17% of global lithium supply. Lithium prices crashed over 80% from late-2022 highs to early-2024 lows. Albemarle kept raising its dividend through the crash and the business threw off 92 million in free cash in 2025 (a down cycle year). EV cycle is turning
